message.content:
You are doing a paddock-locked mechanical rename for Recipe Bottle pace ₢BBAAU. **Symbol substitution only — no behavioral changes, no incidental cleanup, no helper extractions.**

Image-domain "muster" verb is being renamed to "audit". You are responsible for the **bash file slice**. Three files:

## File 1: `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/rbz_zipper.sh`

Lines ~122-131 (verify by reading first). Substitutions:

- Line 124 comment: `muster (catalog-list)` → `audit (catalog-list)`
- Line 129: `RBZ_MUSTER_HALLMARKS` → `RBZ_AUDIT_HALLMARKS`; tabtarget colophon `rbw-imh` → `rbw-iah`; function ref `rbfl_muster_hallmarks` → `rbfl_audit_hallmarks`; description string `"Muster hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers"` → `"Audit hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers"`
- Line 130: `RBZ_MUSTER_RELIQUARIES` → `RBZ_AUDIT_RELIQUARIES`; `rbw-imr` → `rbw-iar`; `rbfl_muster_reliquaries` → `rbfl_audit_reliquaries`; `"Muster reliquaries — list all reliquary stamps"` → `"Audit reliquaries — list all reliquary stamps"`
- Line 131: `RBZ_MUSTER_ENSHRINEMENTS` → `RBZ_AUDIT_ENSHRINEMENTS`; `rbw-ime` → `rbw-iae`; `rbfl_muster_enshrinements` → `rbfl_audit_enshrinements`; `"Muster enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors"` → `"Audit enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors"`

After editing, also grep the entire file for any remaining lowercase `muster`, uppercase `MUSTER`, or capitalized `Muster` strings — if any are image-domain (not SA-roster, not generic-verb-list comment elsewhere), rename them too. SA-roster muster references should NOT exist in this file (it's a separate domain).

## File 2: `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/rbfl_FoundryLedger.sh`

- Line 19 comment: `inscribe, yoke, jettison, abjure, wrest, rekon, muster, and tally` → `inscribe, yoke, jettison, abjure, wrest, rekon, audit, and tally`
- Line 20 comment: `inscribe, yoke, jettison, abjure, wrest, rekon, muster` → `inscribe, yoke, jettison, abjure, wrest, rekon, audit`
- Line 781: function def `rbfl_muster_hallmarks()` → `rbfl_audit_hallmarks()`
- Line 784: `buc_doc_brief "Muster hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers in registry"` → `buc_doc_brief "Audit hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers in registry"`
- Line 799: `buc_success "Muster complete — 0 hallmarks"` → `buc_success "Audit complete — 0 hallmarks"`
- Line 824: `buc_success "Muster complete"` → `buc_success "Audit complete"`
- Line 827: function def `rbfl_muster_reliquaries()` → `rbfl_audit_reliquaries()`
- Line 830: `buc_doc_brief "Muster reliquaries — list all reliquary stamps in registry"` → `buc_doc_brief "Audit reliquaries — list all reliquary stamps in registry"`
- Line 845: `buc_success "Muster complete — 0 reliquaries"` → `buc_success "Audit complete — 0 reliquaries"`
- Line 870: `buc_success "Muster complete"` → `buc_success "Audit complete"`
- Line 873: function def `rbfl_muster_enshrinements()` → `rbfl_audit_enshrinements()`
- Line 876: `buc_doc_brief "Muster enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors in registry"` → `buc_doc_brief "Audit enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors in registry"`
- Line 891: `buc_success "Muster complete — 0 enshrinements"` → `buc_success "Audit complete — 0 enshrinements"`
- Line 909: `buc_success "Muster complete"` → `buc_success "Audit complete"`

After editing, grep the file for any remaining `muster|Muster|MUSTER` and rename if image-domain.

## File 3: `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/rbfc_FoundryCore.sh`

- Line 524 comment: `# GAR Package Enumeration (Registry API — shared by tally, rekon, muster, batch_vouch)` → `# GAR Package Enumeration (Registry API — shared by tally, rekon, audit, batch_vouch)`

## Verification (do this and report)

1. Run `bash -n` on each of the three files — they must parse clean.
2. Run `grep -nE 'muster|Muster|MUSTER' Tools/rbk/rbz_zipper.sh Tools/rbk/rbfl_FoundryLedger.sh Tools/rbk/rbfc_FoundryCore.sh` — paste the output. Expect zero hits.
3. Confirm all three files were edited.

Do NOT commit. Do NOT run any tt/* tabtargets. Do NOT touch any other files.

Report under 200 words with: (a) line numbers actually changed in each file, (b) bash -n result, (c) grep output, (d) any anomalies you found.

781	rbfl_muster_hallmarks() {
782	  zrbfl_sentinel
783	
784	  buc_doc_brief "Muster hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers in registry"
785	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
786	
787	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"

789	    || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"

792	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
793

798	    buc_info "No hallmarks found under ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/"

800	    return 0
801	  fi
802	
803	  echo ""

805	  printf "  %s\n" "------------------------------"
806

808	  local z_prev=""

input.old_string:
rbfl_muster_hallmarks() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Muster hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers in registry"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
  local z_token=""
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"

  buc_step "Enumerating hallmarks under ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/"
  zrbfc_list_packages_capture "${z_token}" "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}"

  if ! test -s "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"; then
    buc_info "No hallmarks found under ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/"
    buc_success "Muster complete — 0 hallmarks"
    return 0
  fi

  echo ""
  printf "  %s\n" "HALLMARK"
  printf "  %s\n" "------------------------------"

  local z_count=0
  local z_prev=""
  local z_line=""
  local z_h=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    test -n "${z_line}" || continue
    z_h="${z_line%% *}"
    test -n "${z_h}" || continue
    if test "${z_h}" != "${z_prev}"; then
      printf "  %s\n" "${z_h}"
      z_count=$(( z_count + 1 ))
      z_prev="${z_h}"
    fi
  done < "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"

  echo ""
  buc_info "Total hallmarks: ${z_count}"
  buc_success "Muster complete"
}
input.new_string:
rbfl_audit_hallmarks() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Audit hallmarks — list all hallmark identifiers in registry"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
  local z_token=""
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"

  buc_step "Enumerating hallmarks under ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/"
  zrbfc_list_packages_capture "${z_token}" "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}"

  if ! test -s "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"; then
    buc_info "No hallmarks found under ${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/"
    buc_success "Audit complete — 0 hallmarks"
    return 0
  fi

  echo ""
  printf "  %s\n" "HALLMARK"
  printf "  %s\n" "------------------------------"

  local z_count=0
  local z_prev=""
  local z_line=""
  local z_h=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    test -n "${z_line}" || continue
    z_h="${z_line%% *}"
    test -n "${z_h}" || continue
    if test "${z_h}" != "${z_prev}"; then
      printf "  %s\n" "${z_h}"
      z_count=$(( z_count + 1 ))
      z_prev="${z_h}"
    fi
  done < "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"

  echo ""
  buc_info "Total hallmarks: ${z_count}"
  buc_success "Audit complete"
}

rbfl_muster_enshrinements() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Muster enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors in registry"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
  local z_token=""
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"

  buc_step "Enumerating enshrinements under ${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}/"
  zrbfc_list_anchors_capture "${z_token}" "${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}"

  if ! test -s "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"; then
    buc_info "No enshrinements found under ${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}/"
    buc_success "Muster complete — 0 enshrinements"
    return 0
  fi

  echo ""
  printf "  %s\n" "ENSHRINE-ANCHOR"
  printf "  %s\n" "------------------------------"

  local z_count=0
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    test -n "${z_line}" || continue
    printf "  %s\n" "${z_line}"
    z_count=$(( z_count + 1 ))
  done < "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"

  echo ""
  buc_info "Total enshrinements: ${z_count}"
  buc_success "Muster complete"
}

rbfl_audit_enshrinements() {
  zrbfl_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Audit enshrinements — list all enshrined base anchors in registry"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
  local z_token=""
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"

  buc_step "Enumerating enshrinements under ${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}/"
  zrbfc_list_anchors_capture "${z_token}" "${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}"

  if ! test -s "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"; then
    buc_info "No enshrinements found under ${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}/"
    buc_success "Audit complete — 0 enshrinements"
    return 0
  fi

  echo ""
  printf "  %s\n" "ENSHRINE-ANCHOR"
  printf "  %s\n" "------------------------------"

  local z_count=0
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    test -n "${z_line}" || continue
    printf "  %s\n" "${z_line}"
    z_count=$(( z_count + 1 ))
  done < "${ZRBFC_PACKAGE_LIST_FILE}"

  echo ""
  buc_info "Total enshrinements: ${z_count}"
  buc_success "Audit complete"
}
